description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the clojure:latest Docker image with a postgres:9.3 service and defines DATABASE_URL and POSTGRES_DB variables for the test database. Add a global before_script that runs `lein deps` then `lein migratus migrate` to install dependencies and apply migrations before any job. Define a single job named test in the default test stage that executes the shell command `lein test`. The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, or special rules, so the test job runs on every pipeline execution.
